summary: High‑quality soundboard capture of an energetic Civic Center show that many fans rank among their favorites.
review: Both reviewers praise the recording, noting a clear and well‑balanced soundboard mix while mentioning that the crowd is less pronounced than in audience recordings. The performance itself is described as one of the best shows attended, with a lively atmosphere and strong band energy throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive comments on both the musical performance and the soundboard recording give it a solid rating; limited to two reviews, so confidence is moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear and well‑balanced board mix; crowd presence less pronounced than in audience recordings but overall very listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic, crowd‑driven performance that fans remember as one of the best shows at the Civic Center.
